rationale: Wrote a self-contained det.rs (imports + minimal type defs for DelegationMap/KeyIterator/EndPoint/etc.) where DelegationMap<K> has a single transparent field m: Map<K, AbstractEndPoint>, view() returns m, and valid() asserts dom().is_full(). Inserted proof block: (1) guards on the big premise via if; (2) instantiates each universal at ki = KeyIterator{k: Some(k)} for an arbitrary k:K (so !is_end_spec and *ki.get() == k); (3) case-splits on KeyIterator::between to align post1/post2 values via dst@ or pre_self_@; (4) extensional Map equality (=~=) then yields post1_self_@ == post2_self_@, which entails post1_self_ == post2_self_ via the single transparent field. Verus exits 0 (1 verified, 0 errors).
